title: Software Update - DFU - Animations on Software Update screen
scenario: Software Update screen animations during DFU flow on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Tap the Update button — the Software Update screen should slide in from the right.
5. Tap Continue — the Three Easy Steps screen should slide in from the right.
6. Tap the back arrow — the Software Update screen should slide in from the left.
7. Navigate back to the Three Easy Steps screen and tap "Start Update".
8. Observe the Updating screen — it should slide in from the right with an animated picture in the center.
expected: All screen transitions are smooth and follow the correct slide direction: Software Update slides in from the right, Three Easy Steps slides in from the right, back navigation slides from the left, and the Updating screen slides in from the right with a centered animated picture.
